title: Programmer Art+ Glass Bottom Boats
description: An addon for the Programmer Art+ texture pack which implements a classic version of Xeadas' glass bottom boats texture pack.
body:
This texture pack implements a classic version of [Xeadas' glass bottom boats texture pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/xeadas-glass-bottom-boats/) into Minecraft as an addon for Programmer Art+.
It lets you get a clearer view of everything underwater without the annoying fog.
That's about it, it's quite simple.
